sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91734" key="puristefh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρι-στεφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n91734.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fire-wreathed</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">crowned</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nonn.</author> </bibl> </sense> <sense n="D" id="n91734.1" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.289</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
